requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) British Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — 240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）英式插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — 240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）英式插頭

summary.en: Kuwait mains supply is 240 V / 50 Hz. The mandatory plug and socket standard is Type G (BS 1363 — 3-pin rectangular blade). This is the British standard, which Kuwait adopted as a legacy of the Gulf region's British infrastructure history. Note: Kuwait retains Type G unlike some Gulf states that have transitioned to Type C/F (Europlug/Schuko). Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices must be designed for or supplied with Type G plugs compatible with 240 V / 50 Hz. Electrical safety testing to IEC 62368-1 (superseding IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065) is required as adopted by GSO. Test reports must be from a CITRA-accepted or GSO-authorised laboratory. Products with fixed Type C/F plugs are not directly compatible and require an adapter or plug change.
summary.zh: 科威特市电为240 V / 50 Hz。强制插头和插座标准为G型（BS 1363 — 三脚矩形刀片）。这是英式标准，科威特因海湾地区的英国基础设施历史遗留而采用。注意：科威特保留G型插头，与部分已转型为C/F型（欧式插头/Schuko）的海湾国家不同。市电供电的无线和物联网设备须设计为或随附与240 V / 50 Hz兼容的G型插头。电气安全测试须依据GSO采纳的IEC 62368-1（取代IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065）进行。测试报告须来自CITRA认可或GSO授权实验室。带固定C/F型插头的产品不能直接兼容，需要转换器或更换插头。
summary.zht: 科威特市電為240 V / 50 Hz。強制插頭和插座標準為G型（BS 1363 — 三腳矩形刀片）。這是英式標準，科威特因海灣地區的英國基礎設施歷史遺留而採用。注意：科威特保留G型插頭，與部分已轉型為C/F型（歐式插頭/Schuko）的海灣國家不同。市電供電的無線和物聯網裝置須設計為或隨附與240 V / 50 Hz兼容的G型插頭。電氣安全測試須依據GSO採納的IEC 62368-1（取代IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065）進行。測試報告須來自CITRA認可或GSO授權實驗室。帶固定C/F型插頭的產品不能直接兼容，需要轉換器或更換插頭。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment — Safety, as adopted by GSO)
BS 1363 / Type G plug and socket standard (240 V / 50 Hz)
GSO Technical Regulation for Electrical Safety (GCC member states)
Kuwait Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — electrical product regulations

summary.en: China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. The standard plug is Type I (AS/NZS 3112 variant — two or three flat blades) or a combined socket accepting Type A/C/I. Electrical safety testing in China uses GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) or GB 62368.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1 — transitioning). CCC certification covers electrical safety for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 中国市电为220 V / 50 Hz。标准插头为I型（AS/NZS 3112变体 — 两或三个扁平刀片）或接受A/C/I型的综合插座。中国电气安全测试使用GB 4943.1（等效IEC 60950-1）或GB 62368.1（等效IEC 62368-1 — 过渡中）。CCC认证涵盖列入范围产品的电气安全。
summary.zht: 中國市電為220 V / 50 Hz。標準插頭為I型（AS/NZS 3112變體 — 兩或三個扁平刀片）或接受A/C/I型的綜合插座。中國電氣安全測試使用GB 4943.1（等效IEC 60950-1）或GB 62368.1（等效IEC 62368-1 — 過渡中）。CCC認證涵蓋列入範圍產品的電氣安全。

gap.en: China products are typically designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I plugs, while Kuwait requires 240 V / 50 Hz with Type G (BS 1363) plugs. Although 220 V and 240 V devices are often compatible in practice (within the IEC 60038 +-10% tolerance band), the plug type difference is a hard incompatibility for fixed-plug products. Exporters must supply Type G plug variants or universal adapters. Electrical safety test reports to GB 4943.1/GB 62368.1 are not accepted; retesting to IEC 62368-1 from a CITRA-accepted or GSO-authorised laboratory is required.
gap.zh: 中国产品通常针对220 V / 50 Hz和I型插头设计，而科威特要求240 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插头。虽然220 V和240 V设备在实践中通常兼容（在IEC 60038 +-10%容差范围内），但插头类型差异对于固定插头产品是硬性不兼容问题。出口商须提供G型插头变体或通用转换器。GB 4943.1/GB 62368.1电气安全测试报告不被接受；须从CITRA认可或GSO授权实验室重新按IEC 62368-1进行测试。
gap.zht: 中國產品通常針對220 V / 50 Hz和I型插頭設計，而科威特要求240 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插頭。雖然220 V和240 V裝置在實踐中通常兼容（在IEC 60038 +-10%容差範圍內），但插頭類型差異對於固定插頭產品是硬性不兼容問題。出口商須提供G型插頭變體或通用轉換器。GB 4943.1/GB 62368.1電氣安全測試報告不被接受；須從CITRA認可或GSO授權實驗室重新按IEC 62368-1進行測試。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardisation Organisation; IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kuwait requires 240 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs and IEC 62368-1 electrical safety testing from a CITRA-accepted or GSO-authorised laboratory. China-format plugs (Type I) are not directly compatible. GB 4943.1 / GB 62368.1 test reports are not accepted substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科威特要求240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头及来自CITRA认可或GSO授权实验室的IEC 62368-1电气安全测试。中国格式插头（I型）不能直接兼容。GB 4943.1 / GB 62368.1测试报告不可作为替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科威特要求240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭及來自CITRA認可或GSO授權實驗室的IEC 62368-1電氣安全測試。中國格式插頭（I型）不能直接兼容。GB 4943.1 / GB 62368.1測試報告不可作為替代。
